capabilities.description: Run full Vitest + Playwright test suite and report pass/fail results
Type-check and lint a specific file or directory
Run testbook to validate agent output quality on real test cases
Run regression tests after a fix to ensure no new breakages

skills.description: Run npx vitest run and return pass/fail summary
skills.returns: { passed: number, failed: number, skipped: number, duration: number }

skills.description: Run npx tsc --noEmit and return error count
Run npm run lint and return error/warning count
Run npx tsx scripts/testbook.ts to validate agent output on test cases

parameters.name: agent
parameters.description: Specific agent to test (classifier, analyzer, etc.)

skills.returns: { totalCases: number, passed: number, accuracy: number }
